source_command: manual closeout update for P1-P3 no-human learning claim follow-up
summary: 2026-05-08 dual new review cross-check compared against current code; post-seal typed authority, pre/post seal linkage comparison, source-package test profile guard, release ZIP atomic boundedness, bounded no-human learning claim follow-ups, canonical public-check summary evidence binding, confirmed same-family evidence cohort binding, and actual same-family confirmed evidence accumulation have been automated.

observations.problem: The post-seal attestation binds the source ZIP, batch manifest, self-check, and operator summary digests, but release_authority still exposes full-suite, learning revalidation, accepted-risk, and advisory lifecycle details only through the operator_summary string.
observations.why_it_matters: A sidecar can pass integrity verification while the machine-readable reason for release_authority_status=blocked remains indirect, which keeps operator tooling dependent on a human-readable summary string.
observations.automation_candidate: Copy the typed fields already present in operator-release-summary into release-post-seal-attestation release_authority, add blocking_reasons[], and assert the schema rejects string-only blocked authority records.
observations.suggested_followup: Automated on 2026-05-08: release-post-seal-attestation now copies full_suite_status, learning_revalidation_status, accepted_risk_count, clean_lane_blocking_accepted_risk_family_count, advisory_lifecycle_family_count, and blocking_reasons[] from operator-release-summary and the batch manifest without parsing operator_summary.

observations.problem: The source ZIP self-description now records linkage_phase=pre_seal_package_build_snapshot and post_seal_authority, but current post-seal digests can still differ from the embedded pre-seal linked_artifacts without a first-class comparison result.
observations.why_it_matters: Operators should be able to distinguish expected pre/post seal digest evolution from an actual authority drift without manually comparing ZIP-embedded hashes against current sidecars.
observations.automation_candidate: Have the post-seal attestation or closeout self-check read the ZIP self-description and emit pre_seal_observed_sha256, current_post_seal_sha256, authoritative_post_seal_digest_source, and linkage_status per linked artifact.
observations.suggested_followup: Automated on 2026-05-08: release-post-seal-attestation now reads the source ZIP self-description and emits pre_seal_post_seal_linkage with pre_seal_observed_sha256, current_post_seal_sha256, authoritative_post_seal_digest_source, and linkage_status per linked artifact.

observations.problem: The distribution profile matrix defines source_content_package and release_evidence_bundle, and current checked-in evidence tests pass in the full workspace, but there is still no narrow source package test target that encodes which generated-report contracts are intentionally out of scope for a clean source ZIP extract.
observations.why_it_matters: Without a profile-aware test target, future source-only extracts can regress back into evidence-complete test expectations or silently skip too much when generated artifacts are absent.
observations.automation_candidate: Add a source_content_package test mode or Make target that runs collect/static/package-safe tests, deselects evidence-complete contract tests through a policy-backed list, and asserts the deselection set is documented.
observations.suggested_followup: Automated on 2026-05-08: added make test-source-package, make release-source-package-check, SOURCE_PACKAGE_* variables, and ops/policies/source-package-test-deselections.json so source-only clean extracts have a policy-backed executable test profile.

observations.problem: release_smoke writes the requested archive_out path directly during build_release_archive; output-parent preflight and partial reports are present, but an interrupted archive build can still leave a partial ZIP at the final release path.
observations.why_it_matters: A partial file named like the release ZIP can be mistaken for a materialized source package until a later digest or ZIP integrity check catches it.
observations.automation_candidate: Build release archives in a sibling temp path, atomically replace the final archive only after the ZIP closes and validates, and move interrupted partial archives to a quarantine path recorded in the partial report.
observations.suggested_followup: Automated on 2026-05-08: release_smoke now writes release ZIPs to a sibling temp path, validates testzip and self-description readback before atomic replace, and records archive_write quarantine metadata on partial failures.

observations.problem: The P3 confirmed-learning policy correctly requires public-check evidence, but the current public-check lane only returns a command result and does not promote a canonical ops/reports/public-check-summary.json artifact for machine readback.
observations.why_it_matters: Confirmed no-human learning improvement should be stale-proof against public mirror drift. Without a canonical public-check summary digest, the strict confirmed lane must remain not_ready even when make public-check passes in the current shell.
observations.automation_candidate: Add a public-check summary producer and schema, wire make public-check to optionally promote ops/reports/public-check-summary.json, and bind that digest into learning-claim-evidence-bundle before confirmed_learning_improvement can auto_confirm.
observations.suggested_followup: Automated on 2026-05-09: added ops/scripts/public_check_summary.py, ops/schemas/public-check-summary.schema.json, make public-check-summary, and canonical public-check promotion through make public-check. learning-claim-evidence-bundle now binds ops/reports/public-check-summary.json, and confirmed policy public_check_pass now reads a schema-backed artifact instead of an out-of-band command pass.

observations.problem: Confirmed learning improvement needed a canonical repeated same-family evidence cohort so machine approval could distinguish bounded learning-likely from a stronger confirmed improvement claim.
observations.why_it_matters: Without a cohort digest and predicate-level operator surface, no-human approval could either overstate learning claims or leave operators guessing which strict confirmed predicate was still closed.
observations.automation_candidate: Bind confirmed policy to ops/reports/learning-confirmed-evidence-cohort.json, require at least three valid before/after behavior-delta readbacks from the same proposal family, and surface failing predicates in scoreboard, dashboard, and operator summary.
observations.suggested_followup: Automated on 2026-05-09: added the learning-confirmed-evidence-cohort canonical artifact, schema, Make target, release closeout ordering, same-family 3-run fixture coverage, stale/revoked drift tests for public-check/run-set/behavior-delta digest changes, and predicate-level dashboard/operator summaries. Follow-up completed on 2026-05-09: learning-claim-evidence-bundle now binds mechanism-review confirmed history through confirmed_run_set/confirmed_telemetry_evidence, legacy missing telemetry digest is accepted only via behavior-delta artifact readback plus promotion-report secondary-evidence reconstruction, and current evidence reaches confirmed_evidence_status=auto_confirmed with 3 valid PROMOTE runs in contract_regression_signals.
